queries.question: Which album has the longest song and what month and year was it released?
queries.sql: SELECT AlbumName, Year, Month FROM Albums JOIN Songs ON Albums.AlbumID = Songs.AlbumID ORDER By duration DESC LIMIT 1 ;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?albumname ?year ?month WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasAlbums ?albums .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?albums p:Month ?month .
  ?songs p:Duration ?duration_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: For each singer, show me the album, its release year and month, and concert venue.
queries.sql: SELECT artistname, AlbumName, Year, Month, Venue FROM Albums JOIN Artists on Albums.ArtistID = Artists.ArtistID JOIN Concerts ON Concerts.HeadlinerID = Artists.ArtistID;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?artistname ?albumname ?year ?month ?venue WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists_HeadlinerID ?artists .
  ?artists p:ArtistName ?artistname .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?albums p:Month ?month .
  ?concerts p:Venue ?venue .
}

queries.question: For each singer, show me the album, its release year and concert venue.
queries.sql: SELECT artistname, AlbumName, Year, Venue FROM Albums JOIN Artists on Albums.ArtistID = Artists.ArtistID JOIN Concerts ON Concerts.HeadlinerID = Artists.ArtistID;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?artistname ?albumname ?year ?venue WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists_HeadlinerID ?artists .
  ?artists p:ArtistName ?artistname .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?concerts p:Venue ?venue .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which album has the longest song and when was it released?
For each singer, show me the album and its release timeframe and concert venue.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?artistname ?albumname ?year ?month ?venue WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists_HeadlinerID ?artists .
  ?artists p:ArtistName ?artistname .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?albums p:Month ?month .
  ?concerts p:Venue ?venue .
} }
  component: { SELECT ?artistname ?albumname ?month ?venue WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists_HeadlinerID ?artists .
  ?artists p:ArtistName ?artistname .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Month ?month .
  ?concerts p:Venue ?venue .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?artistname ?albumname ?year ?venue WHERE {
  ?albums a :Album .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?albums p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?concerts p:hasArtists_HeadlinerID ?artists .
  ?artists p:ArtistName ?artistname .
  ?albums p:AlbumName ?albumname .
  ?albums p:Year ?year .
  ?concerts p:Venue ?venue .
} }
}
